reasoning: Read the Tomcat users config file to discover valid credentials. Running inside a Windows shell obtained via Metasploit.
Switch to PowerShell. Load the Active Directory module and look up the HelpDesk group to get its LDAP distinguished name and SID for later manipulation.
Take ownership of the HelpDesk AD group using the tomcat.svc account (the account we're running as via the Tomcat exploit). This gives us control over group membership.

reasoning: Grant GenericAll rights on the HelpDesk group to tomcat.svc. GenericAll means full control — allows reading, writing, and managing group membership.
